description: This week's Changelog discusses Solana updates including Grizzly Thon submissions, a core community call, and a proposal for tiered account storage. The proposal aims to optimize storage based on account usage frequency. Additionally, new compute budget instructions and an Anchor update are highlighted.
topic_summary: Updates on Solana including Grizzly Thon submissions [t=7:60], core community call [t=37:18], tiered account storage proposal [t=86:81], new compute budget instruction [t=216:15], and Anchor update [t=282:55].
